description: Posts that invite followers to participate in a guessing or ordering challenge by sharing their answers in comments, typically featuring product arrangement or identification tasks.
structural_recipe: 1) Present a visual challenge (reordered product images, hidden items, or sequencing task) 2) Ask a direct question in Arabic with challenge framing ('تقدر ترتب...' or 'مين قدر...') 3) Explicitly invite comment participation ('شاركونا في التعليقات') 4) Use eye emojis (👀) and encouraging tone (😎❤) 5) Include relevant hashtags (beauty, skincare, natural terms in Arabic and English)
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to interactive content that gamifies product engagement and creates community participation. The challenge format makes followers feel involved in the brand experience while the Arabic framing with casual tone creates relatability. Comments drive algorithmic visibility and build community sense.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure challenge difficulty is moderate—too hard discourages participation, too easy feels patronizing
Challenges should relate authentically to product category; arbitrary challenges may seem forced
Monitor comment quality; challenges can attract spam or off-topic responses
